SDL-HappyClaw — Restaurant Case Study

The Restaurant That Has an Answer for Everything

Allergen compliance. Wine pairings. Specialty coffee education. Origin-led brunch storytelling. A restaurant that communicates intelligently about every element of its offering — in any language, at any hour — is a restaurant guests come back to.

Why Most Restaurants Are Leaving Value Uncommunicated

Not for lack of quality. For lack of knowledge systems. The food is excellent. The wine list is considered. The coffee is specialty. But most guests never know.

1

Allergen Compliance Is a Legal Minefield

EU Regulation 1169/2011 requires accurate allergen declarations for every dish. Seasonal menus, daily specials, and supplier changes make this a permanent burden. One wrong answer carries real legal and reputational risk.

2

The Wine List Is an Untold Story

Your sommelier can't be at every table simultaneously. Guests default to safe choices because nobody guided them. Your Burgundy collects dust while the house red does all the work.

3

Specialty Coffee Goes Unnoticed

You source a washed Ethiopian and a natural Guatemalan. Guests order "a coffee." The origin, the altitude, the processing, the recommended pairing — it all goes unsaid, un-explored, and un-upsold.

4

Multilingual Guests Feel Underserved

A French-speaking party asks about allergens. A Japanese couple wants gluten-free options. Your team does their best — but "I'm not sure" is not the experience anyone intended to deliver.

5

Marketing Is an Afterthought

New seasonal menu? Wine arrival? Coffee origin worth celebrating? The story exists — it just never gets told. Social media goes quiet for weeks. Your competitor posts daily.

6

Bookings Stop When You Close

Saturday night, 10pm: someone decides to book your restaurant for next Friday. Your inbox waits until Monday morning. By then, they've confirmed elsewhere.

Four Knowledge Systems. One Restaurant. Endless Content.

SDL-HappyClaw ingests your menu, wine list, coffee programme, and allergen data — then turns all of it into materials your staff can use and your guests can trust.

🏷️ EU Allergen Compliance — the Legal Foundation

Regulation (EU) No 1169/2011 makes allergen labelling mandatory for every dish. SDL-HappyClaw produces fully compliant documentation — automatically updated whenever your menu or suppliers change. This isn't just a poster: it's a live knowledge system that protects your guests and your business.

EU Allergens & Mandatory Labelling Guide · Regulation (EU) No 1169/2011 · Produced by SDL-HappyClaw · Under 3 minutes to generate

📋 Per-Dish Allergen MatrixA staff-facing reference updated every time the menu or a supplier changes. Kitchen and front-of-house always work from the same verified data.
📱 QR Code Guest MenuGuests scan at the table and get real-time allergen information for every dish — in their own language. No waiting, no guessing.
🖨️ Compliant Wall DisplayBold-highlighted allergen poster for non-prepacked food service, formatted to Article 21 requirements. Ready to print, ready to display.
🌍 Multilingual DeclarationsThe same allergen data in EN, DE, FR, ES, IT and more. One source, zero translation cost, zero risk of human error between versions.

☕ Coffee Origins — Brunch Storytelling & Table Education

If your restaurant serves specialty coffee — at brunch, post-dinner, or as a standalone programme — the origin story is a genuine differentiator. Most restaurants serve it. Almost none explain it. SDL-HappyClaw turns your specific beans into compelling table materials and measurable upsell.

Global Coffee Origin Knowledge Map · Terroir · Varietals · Processing Methods · Flavour Profiles · Produced by SDL-HappyClaw

☕ Brunch Table Card"Where does our coffee come from?" answered at every table — origin, altitude, processing, and tasting notes for the beans you actually stock.
🗺️ Origin Wall DisplayA café-style knowledge poster showing your current sourcing regions. Changes when your beans change. Never out of date.
📸 Social Media Series"Meet your morning coffee" — a multi-post origin story for Instagram, Facebook, or WhatsApp, produced from your supplier sheets in minutes.
💬 Guest Q&AGuest scans QR and asks "what's the difference between your Ethiopian and Guatemalan?" — SDL-HappyClaw answers from your specific current stock.

☕ Complete Coffee Knowledge — Staff Training & Dessert Pairing

From altitude and varietals to processing methods, grading, and brew ratios — SDL-HappyClaw gives your front-of-house team (and your guests) a complete education on every cup you serve. Including which dessert it pairs with.

Complete Coffee Knowledge Panorama · Origins · Varietals · Grading · Processing · Brew Methods · Pairing Guide · Produced by SDL-HappyClaw

👨‍🍳 Staff Knowledge BriefNew front-of-house hire? SDL-HappyClaw produces a coffee knowledge brief for your specific menu — not a generic guide, but one grounded in what you serve.
🍰 Coffee & Dessert Pairing CardThe espresso with the dark chocolate fondant. The pour-over with the lemon tart. Specific pairings from your actual dessert menu.
🫖 Brew Method InsertExplains why you offer French press, V60, and espresso — and guides guests to the right choice for their taste preference.
🗓️ New Bean AnnouncementNew single-origin arrives. SDL-HappyClaw drafts the table tent, the social post, and the WhatsApp broadcast — simultaneously, in minutes.

🍷 Wine & Food Pairing — the Upsell That Pays for Itself

The right pairing recommendation turns a €28 wine order into a €52 one. SDL-HappyClaw learns your wine list and your food menu, then creates pairing tools that work at the table, on the printed menu, and through your guest-facing AI agent.

Wine & Food — The Complete Knowledge Landscape · Pairing Principles · Combination Table · Regional Classics · Serving Temperatures · Produced by SDL-HappyClaw

🍽️ Per-Dish Pairing CardA wine recommendation beside each main course — drawn from your actual list with tasting rationale, not generic varietal suggestions.
📖 Tasting Menu InsertA dedicated pairing card for set menus with the reasoning behind each selection. Elevates the experience and lifts average spend.
💡 Staff Pocket ReferenceA one-page wine-by-the-glass guide for servers — every team member recommends with confidence, even without sommelier training.
📲 Guest Pairing BotGuest scans QR and describes their dish. SDL-HappyClaw recommends from your actual cellar stock — accurate, instant, naturally upselling.

How SDL-HappyClaw Works

Three steps. No design agency. No translation budget. No agency retainer.

1

Upload Your Menu, Wine List, Coffee Sheets & Allergen Data

One upload. SDL-HappyClaw becomes your living knowledge base — updated the moment your menu changes.

Restaurant Manager
"Here's our new autumn menu PDF, updated wine list with 8 new arrivals, our allergen matrix, and our coffee supplier sheets. The new Guatemalan single-origin is from Huehuetenango at 1,800m, washed process."
SDL-HappyClaw
"All ingested. A few things I've flagged automatically: the new pumpkin velouté contains Celery and Milk (Parmigiano) — allergen poster is already updated. The Guatemalan pairs beautifully with your dark chocolate fondant — shall I add that to the dessert pairing card? For the 8 new wines, tasting notes are drafted and matched to your current dishes. Want the tasting menu pairing insert first, or the wine-by-the-glass staff reference?"
2

Your Materials Are Produced Automatically

What gets produced — automatically, from your data:
✓ EU-compliant allergen sheet (bold-highlighted per Article 21) — updated on every menu change
✓ Wine-food pairing insert tailored to your specific list and dishes
✓ Coffee origin table cards, brew method guide, and dessert pairing card
✓ Staff reference sheets for allergens, wine, and coffee
✓ Social media content for every new dish, wine arrival, or coffee bean
✓ All of the above in 20+ languages — same source, zero extra effort
3

Guests Get Expert Answers 24/7 — In Their Language

Guest (via table QR, WhatsApp)
"My daughter is severely allergic to peanuts and tree nuts. What can she eat from your tasting menu tonight?"
SDL-HappyClaw
"I understand — this is our priority. From tonight's tasting menu, the following are completely nut-free and prepared in a separate area: Seared scallop with cauliflower purée ✓ · Beef fillet with truffle jus ✓ · Dark chocolate fondant ✓ (our chef confirms no nut cross-contamination on this dish). Please inform your server immediately — we'll place a red allergen flag on your table so the kitchen is alerted at every stage. 🚩"

The Restaurant Skill Pack

🍽️ Restaurant & Dining Skill Pack

v1.0
SkillWhat It DoesExample Trigger
Allergen Knowledge EngineIngests your full menu and allergen matrix. Answers guest queries accurately in any language. Flags changes when dishes or suppliers update. Produces 1169/2011-compliant documentation automatically."Is the mushroom risotto safe for a sesame allergy?"
Wine Pairing AdvisorLearns your wine list and food menu. Recommends specific bottles and glasses based on the guest's dish, taste preference, and budget. Produces per-dish pairing cards and staff reference sheets."We're having the lamb — what wine would you suggest?"
Coffee Origin & EducationTurns your coffee sourcing into guest-facing content: table cards, brew method guides, origin posters, staff training briefs, and dessert pairings — specific to the beans you currently stock."Tell me about the Ethiopian on your brunch menu"
Menu CopywriterWrites compelling, accurate descriptions for every dish — for print menus, your website, and social media. One dish, five formats, any language."Write a description for the pan-seared sea bass with saffron beurre blanc"
Social Media EngineProduces Instagram captions, Facebook posts, and WhatsApp broadcasts for new dishes, seasonal menus, events, wine arrivals, and coffee launches — consistently and on-brand."Create this week's posts for our new autumn menu launch"
Multilingual Guest SupportAnswers allergen questions, menu queries, and booking requests in 20+ languages via WhatsApp, website widget, or table QR code. 24 hours a day."Avez-vous des options sans gluten ce soir?"
Booking HandlerTakes table reservations around the clock — collects party size, dietary requirements, and special occasions. Passes confirmed details to your team or reservation system."I'd like to book for 6 on Saturday — two guests are vegetarian"
Campaign & Event PlannerPlans and produces full promotional campaigns — harvest dinners, wine evenings, Valentine's — with social content, email copy, and table materials all produced in one session."Plan our winemaker dinner for November — we need invites, social posts, and a pairing menu card"

SDL-HappyClaw in the Restaurant: Live Conversations

What your guests experience when they interact with your AI agent at the table.

🚨 Severe Nut Allergy — Tasting Menu

Guest: "My son is severely allergic to all tree nuts and peanuts. Is there anything safe for him from tonight's tasting menu?"
SDL-HappyClaw: "This is our top priority. From tonight's menu, these dishes are completely nut-free with no cross-contamination risk: Seared scallop with cauliflower ✓ · Beef fillet with truffle jus ✓ · Dark chocolate fondant ✓. The amuse-bouche contains almonds and cannot be adapted. Please tell your server now so we can place a red flag on your table — our kitchen follows strict separation protocols for nut allergies. 🚩"

🍷 Wine Pairing — Split Table

Guest: "Two of us are having fish, two having red meat. We'd like one bottle that works for everyone — not too expensive."
SDL-HappyClaw: "A classic challenge! Our 2020 Alsatian Pinot Gris (€46) is the bridge: enough body and weight for the meat, enough freshness and fruit for the fish. Alternatively, a light Pinot Noir (our Burgundy at €52) is elegant enough not to overpower delicate fish. The Pinot Gris is the safer bet for the group. Want me to let your server know? 🍷"

☕ Brunch Coffee Question

Guest: "What's the difference between your Ethiopian and your Guatemalan? I can never tell."
SDL-HappyClaw: "Our Ethiopian (Yirgacheffe, washed) is floral and tea-like — jasmine, bergamot, peach. Beautiful as a V60 pour-over. Our Guatemalan (Huehuetenango, 1,800m) is darker and richer — chocolate, hazelnut, caramel. Best as an espresso or flat white. Having pancakes with berries? Go Ethiopian. Full breakfast with eggs? Guatemalan. ☕"

🌍 Multilingual — French Guest

Guest: "Bonsoir. Je suis intolérant au lactose. Qu'est-ce que je peux manger ce soir?"
SDL-HappyClaw (in French): "Bonsoir! Voici les plats sans lait ni lactose de notre carte ce soir: Carpaccio de betterave avec vinaigrette aux agrumes ✓ · Bavette de bœuf grillée avec légumes rôtis ✓ · Sorbet citron en dessert ✓. Informez votre serveur pour qu'une note soit ajoutée à votre commande. Puis-je vous aider avec autre chose?"

The Restaurant Formula

Operations side: SDL-HappyClaw produces allergen sheets, wine pairing cards, coffee guides, and marketing content.
Guest side: SDL-HappyClaw answers questions, advises on wine, explains coffee, takes bookings — 24/7, in any language.
Result: Your restaurant is known for knowledge and care, not just for food.

The Numbers That Matter

A straightforward comparison for any restaurant owner doing the maths.

Option A — Traditional Approach

  • Graphic designer (allergen, pairing, coffee cards): €50–€100/hour
  • 1 material set redesign: €250–€1,000
  • Social media manager retainer: €800–€2,500/month
  • Multilingual translations: +€200–€500 per language per piece
  • After-hours answering service: €150–€400/month
Total Year 1: €15,000–€40,000+
Recommended

Option B — SDL-HappyClaw

  • Setup: €1,950 (one-time)
  • Monthly: €79/month (Team plan)
  • AI costs: ~€185/month (your Anthropic account, zero markup)
  • Unlimited languages & materials included
  • 24/7 guest support included
Total Year 1: €5,118
Savings vs. traditional approach: €10,000–€35,000 in Year 1

Solo plan at €29/month for very small operations. Business All-In at €349/month includes AI managed entirely by SDL-HappyClaw — no Anthropic account needed.
